title: SushiCraft
body:
![SushiCraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c33e5770930511c90866d7a59bd10be20975e50e.png)

SushiCraft is a mod that makes your Minecraft experience significantly more fun by adding sushi, nigiri, ramen, mochi etc. Our mod adds different decorative blocks to make your own sushi restaurant as well!

## **💡 Key Features:**

- New Food (Sushi, Nigiri, Ramen Noodles, Mochi, Rice, Rice Bowl, Egg Fried Rice Bowl, Dango, Sushi Rolls)
- New Blocks (Sushi Meal, Nigiri Meal, Dragon Roll, California Roll, Philadelphia Roll, Futomaki Roll)
- New Decorations (Kanji Banner)
- New Entities (Eel, Shrimp)
- New Effects (Delightful Effect)

## **📖 Downloading Instructions:**

- Download the version you prefer.
- Click the windows button on the bottom left hand corner / middle.
- Type %appdata% into the textbox and then click enter.
- Find and open the folder called ".minecraft".
- Open the mods folder and put the mod in there!
